description: Understated, classy yet comfy, this pair of sandals from enroute is perfect for the stylish teen. Pared down to the basics, with a minimalist floral appeal, this tops our wishlist for the season!UpperLeather upper with leather straps at the forefootStrap looping around the ankleBuckle closure at the ankle loopLightly padded footbed with a brand patch at the heelOutsoleShort wedge heelTPU textured outsole with a heel patchSandal careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
